title: Tulsi
description: A sacred plant in Hindu tradition, Tulsi is revered as the "Queen of Herbs" for its remarkable healing properties and spiritual significance. This aromatic herb has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for thousands of years.

medicinalUses.title: Immune Booster
medicinalUses.description: Rich in antioxidants and essential oils that strengthen immunity and protect against infections

medicinalUses.title: Respiratory Relief
medicinalUses.description: Effective for cough, cold, asthma management, and clearing respiratory passages

medicinalUses.title: Stress Reducer
medicinalUses.description: Adaptogenic properties help combat stress, anxiety, and promote mental clarity

growingSteps.title: Seed Sowing
growingSteps.description: Plant seeds in well-draining soil with good sunlight exposure. Seeds germinate in 7-10 days.
growingSteps.tips: Soak seeds overnight for better germination rates

growingSteps.title: Watering
growingSteps.description: Keep soil consistently moist but not waterlogged. Water at the base to prevent fungal diseases.
growingSteps.tips: Morning watering is ideal to allow foliage to dry during the day

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Pick leaves regularly to encourage bushy growth. Harvest in the morning for best flavor.
growingSteps.tips: Pinch off flower buds to promote more leaf growth and extend plant life

en.title: Holy Basil
en.description: A sacred plant in Hindu tradition, Tulsi is revered as the "Queen of Herbs" for its remarkable healing properties and spiritual significance.

mr.title: तुळशी
mr.description: हिंदू परंपरेत पवित्र मानली जाणारी तुळशी औषधी वनस्पतींची राणी म्हणून ओळखली जाते.

title: Haldi
description: The golden spice of India, turmeric is celebrated for its powerful anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Its active compound, curcumin, has been extensively researched for medicinal benefits.
season: Planted in monsoon, harvested in winter

medicinalUses.title: Anti-Inflammatory
medicinalUses.description: Curcumin reduces inflammation throughout the body, helping with arthritis and joint pain

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Health
medicinalUses.description: Stimulates bile production, soothes digestive issues, and improves gut health

medicinalUses.title: Skin Care
medicinalUses.description: Natural antiseptic for wounds, helps with acne, and promotes glowing skin

growingSteps.title: Rhizome Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant fresh rhizomes 2-3 inches deep in well-prepared soil rich in organic matter.
growingSteps.tips: Choose rhizomes with visible buds for better sprouting success

growingSteps.title: Growth Period
growingSteps.description: Requires 7-10 months to mature. Keep soil consistently moist during growing season.
growingSteps.tips: Mulch heavily to retain moisture and suppress weeds

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Dig up when leaves turn yellow and dry. Cure rhizomes in shade for 1-2 weeks.
growingSteps.tips: Save some rhizomes for replanting next season

en.title: Turmeric
en.description: The golden spice of India, turmeric is celebrated for its powerful anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.

mr.title: हळद
mr.description: भारताची सोनेरी मसाला म्हणून ओळखली जाणारी हळद शक्तिशाली दाहक-विरोधी गुणधर्मांसाठी प्रसिद्ध आहे.

title: Ashwagandha
description: Known as "Indian Ginseng," Ashwagandha is one of the most powerful herbs in Ayurvedic healing. It's classified as an adaptogen, helping the body manage stress and restore balance.
season: Sown in spring, harvested in winter

medicinalUses.title: Adaptogenic Power
medicinalUses.description: Reduces cortisol levels, manages chronic stress, and promotes mental resilience

medicinalUses.title: Vitality Enhancer
medicinalUses.description: Improves energy, stamina, endurance, and overall physical performance

medicinalUses.title: Brain Health
medicinalUses.description: Supports memory, concentration, and cognitive function in all age groups

growingSteps.title: Seed Starting
growingSteps.description: Sow seeds in spring in nursery beds or pots. Germination takes 2-3 weeks.
growingSteps.tips: Use fresh seeds for better germination; older seeds have lower success rates

growingSteps.title: Transplanting
growingSteps.description: Move seedlings to main field after 6-8 weeks when they're 4-6 inches tall.
growingSteps.tips: Space plants 12-18 inches apart for optimal root development

growingSteps.title: Root Harvest
growingSteps.description: Dig roots after 150-180 days when leaves start yellowing. Wash and dry properly.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest in dry weather for easier cleaning and better storage

en.title: Ashwagandha
en.description: Known as Indian Ginseng, Ashwagandha is one of the most powerful herbs in Ayurvedic healing.

mr.title: अश्वगंधा
mr.description: भारतीय जिनसेंग म्हणून ओळखला जाणारा अश्वगंधा आयुर्वेदातील सर्वात शक्तिशाली औषधी वनस्पतींपैकी एक आहे.

title: Neem
description: The "Village Pharmacy" of India, neem is a versatile medicinal tree with antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal properties. Every part of the tree has therapeutic uses.

medicinalUses.title: Skin Treatment
medicinalUses.description: Effective for acne, eczema, psoriasis, and fungal infections due to antibacterial properties

medicinalUses.title: Oral Health
medicinalUses.description: Natural toothbrush, antibacterial mouthwash, prevents cavities and gum disease

medicinalUses.title: Blood Purifier
medicinalUses.description: Detoxifies blood, supports liver function, and improves overall skin health

growingSteps.title: Seed Planting
growingSteps.description: Sow fresh seeds immediately after collection. Germination occurs in 1-3 weeks.
growingSteps.tips: Seeds lose viability quickly; plant within a week of collection

growingSteps.title: Sapling Care
growingSteps.description: Protect young plants from harsh sun and frost. Water regularly for first 2 years.
growingSteps.tips: Use stake support in windy areas; protect from cattle grazing

growingSteps.title: Mature Tree
growingSteps.description: Requires minimal care once established. Drought-tolerant and pest-resistant.
growingSteps.tips: Prune dead branches annually; use fallen leaves as mulch

en.title: Neem
en.description: The Village Pharmacy of India, neem is a versatile medicinal tree with antibacterial properties.

mr.title: कडुनिंब
mr.description: भारताची गावातील औषधालय म्हणून ओळखले जाणारे कडुनिंब बहुउपयोगी औषधी वृक्ष आहे.

title: Amla
description: Amla is a powerhouse of Vitamin C and antioxidants, revered in Ayurveda as a rejuvenating fruit. It's one of the key ingredients in the famous Ayurvedic formula, Triphala.

medicinalUses.title: Immunity Booster
medicinalUses.description: Extremely high Vitamin C content strengthens immune system and fights infections

medicinalUses.title: Hair Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Promotes hair growth, prevents premature graying, and strengthens hair follicles

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Aid
medicinalUses.description: Improves metabolism, relieves constipation, and supports healthy gut flora

growingSteps.title: Sapling Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant during monsoon season in well-prepared pits with organic matter.
growingSteps.tips: Add compost and neem cake to planting pit for better establishment

growingSteps.title: Initial Years
growingSteps.description: Fruit bearing starts after 4-5 years. Provide regular care in early years.
growingSteps.tips: Be patient; quality improves after 8-10 years

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Pick fruits when they turn greenish-yellow. Handle carefully to avoid bruising.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest in morning; shake branches gently

en.title: Indian Gooseberry
en.description: Amla is a powerhouse of Vitamin C and antioxidants, revered in Ayurveda as a rejuvenating fruit.

mr.title: आवळा
mr.description: व्हिटॅमिन सी आणि अँटीऑक्सिडंट्सचा खजिना असलेला आवळा आयुर्वेदात पुनर्जीवित करणारे फळ म्हणून मानला जातो.

title: Brahmi
description: A renowned brain tonic in Ayurveda, Brahmi is traditionally used to enhance memory, learning, and concentration. This aquatic herb has been used for over 3,000 years.

medicinalUses.title: Brain Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Enhances memory, learning capacity, and concentration in students and elderly

medicinalUses.title: Nerve Support
medicinalUses.description: Protects brain cells, supports neural communication, and prevents cognitive decline

medicinalUses.title: Anxiety Relief
medicinalUses.description: Calms the mind, reduces stress and anxiety without causing drowsiness

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Grow in water-logged soil or shallow water containers. Thrives in aquatic conditions.
growingSteps.tips: Use pond soil or mix garden soil with sand

growingSteps.title: Maintenance
growingSteps.description: Keep constantly moist or partially submerged. Change water weekly in containers.
growingSteps.tips: Add diluted liquid fertilizer monthly

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Pick tender stems and leaves regularly. Encourages bushy growth.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest in morning for best medicinal potency

en.title: Brahmi
en.description: A renowned brain tonic in Ayurveda, traditionally used to enhance memory and concentration.

mr.title: ब्राह्मी
mr.description: आयुर्वेदातील प्रसिद्ध मेंदूसाठी टॉनिक असलेली ब्राह्मी स्मरणशक्ती वाढवण्यासाठी वापरली जाते.

title: Aloe Vera
description: The "Plant of Immortality" as ancient Egyptians called it, Aloe Vera is famous for its soothing gel that heals burns, moisturizes skin, and supports digestive health.

medicinalUses.title: Skin Soother
medicinalUses.description: Treats burns, cuts, sunburn, and skin irritations with cooling gel

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Support
medicinalUses.description: Gel helps with constipation, IBS, and improves overall gut health

medicinalUses.title: Cosmetic Use
medicinalUses.description: Natural moisturizer, anti-aging properties, reduces wrinkles

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Use well-draining cactus soil mix in pots with drainage holes.
growingSteps.tips: Terra cotta pots work best

growingSteps.title: Minimal Care
growingSteps.description: Water sparingly every 2-3 weeks. Allow soil to dry completely.
growingSteps.tips: Yellow leaves indicate overwatering

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Cut outer mature leaves at the base. Extract gel immediately.
growingSteps.tips: Use leaves within 24 hours or refrigerate

en.title: Aloe Vera
en.description: The Plant of Immortality, famous for its soothing gel that heals burns and moisturizes skin.

mr.title: कोरफड
mr.description: अमरत्वाची वनस्पती म्हणून ओळखली जाणारी कोरफड तिच्या शांतता देणाऱ्या जेलसाठी प्रसिद्ध आहे.

title: Giloy
description: Known as "Amrita" (divine nectar) in Sanskrit, Giloy is a powerful immunomodulator and fever reducer. This climbing shrub is one of the most versatile herbs in Ayurveda.

medicinalUses.title: Immune Modulator
medicinalUses.description: Strengthens immunity against viral and bacterial infections naturally

medicinalUses.title: Fever Remedy
medicinalUses.description: Traditionally used for chronic, recurring fevers including dengue and malaria

medicinalUses.title: Blood Purifier
medicinalUses.description: Removes toxins, purifies blood, and supports liver detoxification

growingSteps.title: Stem Cutting
growingSteps.description: Plant 6-8 inch stem cuttings in well-draining soil. Roots develop in 2-3 weeks.
growingSteps.tips: Cut just below a node; plant at 45-degree angle

growingSteps.title: Support Structure
growingSteps.description: Provide trellis, fence, or tree for climbing. Can grow 10-20 feet.
growingSteps.tips: Growing on neem tree increases medicinal potency

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Use mature stems after 1-2 years of growth. Cut in sections.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest in early morning; fresh stems are more potent

en.title: Giloy
en.description: Known as Amrita, Giloy is a powerful immunomodulator and fever reducer.

mr.title: गुलवेल
mr.description: अमृत म्हणून ओळखली जाणारी गुलवेल शक्तिशाली रोगप्रतिकारक शक्ती वाढवणारी वनस्पती आहे.

title: Methi
description: Fenugreek is a dual-purpose plant used both as a culinary herb and medicine. Its seeds are rich in fiber, protein, and compounds beneficial for blood sugar control.

medicinalUses.title: Diabetes Management
medicinalUses.description: Seeds help regulate blood sugar levels naturally

medicinalUses.title: Lactation Aid
medicinalUses.description: Traditional galactagogue for nursing mothers to increase milk production

medicinalUses.title: Hair Care
medicinalUses.description: Paste strengthens hair and reduces dandruff effectively

growingSteps.title: Seed Sowing
growingSteps.description: Direct sow in well-prepared beds. Seeds germinate in 5-7 days.
growingSteps.tips: Soak seeds for 2 hours before planting for faster germination

growingSteps.title: Growth
growingSteps.description: Fast-growing, ready in 20-30 days for leaves, 3-4 months for seeds.
growingSteps.tips: Thin seedlings to 4-6 inches apart for better growth

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Pick leaves early, harvest seeds when pods turn brown and dry.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest seeds in morning to prevent shattering

en.title: Fenugreek
en.description: Fenugreek is a dual-purpose plant used as both culinary herb and medicine.

mr.title: मेथी
mr.description: मेथी ही स्वयंपाक आणि औषध या दोन्ही कामी येणारी वनस्पती आहे.

title: Pudina
description: Mint is a refreshing herb with cooling properties, widely used in Indian cuisine and traditional medicine. Its essential oils have digestive and respiratory benefits.

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Comfort
medicinalUses.description: Relieves indigestion, gas, and nausea effectively

medicinalUses.title: Respiratory Health
medicinalUses.description: Opens airways and relieves congestion naturally

medicinalUses.title: Cooling Agent
medicinalUses.description: External application for headaches and skin irritation

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Use cuttings or runners in moist soil. Roots develop quickly.
growingSteps.tips: Plant in containers to prevent aggressive spreading

growingSteps.title: Containment
growingSteps.description: Grows aggressively, use containers or barriers to control spread.
growingSteps.tips: Bury containers 12 inches deep to prevent root escape

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Pick leaves regularly to promote bushy growth and prevent flowering.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest before flowering for best flavor and potency

en.title: Mint
en.description: Mint is a refreshing herb with cooling properties, widely used in Indian cuisine.

mr.title: पुदीना
mr.description: पुदीना ही थंड गुणधर्म असलेली ताजेतवाने औषधी वनस्पती आहे.

title: Adrak
description: Ginger is one of the most widely used medicinal spices in the world. Its rhizome contains gingerol, a compound with powerful anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
season: Planted in monsoon, harvested after 8-10 months

medicinalUses.title: Nausea Relief
medicinalUses.description: Highly effective for motion sickness and morning sickness

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Fire
medicinalUses.description: Stimulates digestion and relieves bloating effectively

medicinalUses.title: Pain Management
medicinalUses.description: Reduces muscle pain and arthritis symptoms naturally

growingSteps.title: Rhizome Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant fresh ginger pieces with buds 2-3 inches deep in rich soil.
growingSteps.tips: Choose plump rhizomes with multiple buds for best results

growingSteps.title: Growing Period
growingSteps.description: Requires 8-10 months to mature. Maintain consistent moisture.
growingSteps.tips: Mulch heavily and provide partial shade in hot climates

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Dig up when leaves yellow and die back. Cure in shade before storage.
growingSteps.tips: For baby ginger, harvest at 4-5 months for tender rhizomes

en.title: Ginger
en.description: Ginger is one of the most widely used medicinal spices with powerful anti-inflammatory effects.

mr.title: आले
mr.description: आले हे जगातील सर्वात जास्त वापरले जाणारे औषधी मसाले आहे.

title: Curry Patta
description: The quintessential flavoring of South Indian cuisine, curry leaves are more than just aromatic—they're packed with antioxidants and have significant health benefits.

medicinalUses.title: Hair Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Prevents premature graying and promotes healthy hair growth

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Aid
medicinalUses.description: Helps with digestion and reduces diarrhea effectively

medicinalUses.title: Blood Sugar
medicinalUses.description: May help regulate glucose levels naturally

growingSteps.title: Seed/Cutting
growingSteps.description: Fresh seeds germinate better, cuttings are faster. Plant in well-draining soil.
growingSteps.tips: Remove outer seed coat for faster germination; plant immediately

growingSteps.title: Growth
growingSteps.description: Slow initial growth, speeds up after establishment. Be patient.
growingSteps.tips: Transplant to larger pot after 6 months for better growth

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Pick sprigs regularly to encourage branching and bushy growth.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest from different parts of plant to maintain shape

en.title: Curry Leaf
en.description: The quintessential flavoring of South Indian cuisine, packed with antioxidants.

mr.title: कढीपत्ता

title: Shatavari
description: Known as the "Queen of Herbs," Shatavari is the premier female rejuvenative in Ayurveda. Its name means "she who possesses a hundred husbands," referring to its traditional use for reproductive health.

medicinalUses.title: Women's Health
medicinalUses.description: Supports reproductive system and hormonal balance naturally

medicinalUses.title: Rejuvenative
medicinalUses.description: Nourishes and strengthens the body, promotes vitality

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Soothes and protects the digestive tract lining

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Sow seeds or plant root divisions in well-prepared soil.
growingSteps.tips: Scarify seeds or soak overnight for better germination

growingSteps.title: Support
growingSteps.description: Provide trellis or support for climbing vines. Can grow 6-8 feet.
growingSteps.tips: Train vines early to establish climbing pattern

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Roots harvested after 18-24 months when plant is mature.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest tuberous roots in winter for maximum potency

en.title: Shatavari
en.description: Known as the Queen of Herbs, Shatavari is the premier female rejuvenative in Ayurveda.

mr.title: शतावरी

title: Moringa
description: Called the "Miracle Tree," every part of moringa is edible and nutritious. It's packed with vitamins, minerals, and amino acids, making it one of the most nutrient-dense plants on Earth.

medicinalUses.title: Nutritional Supplement
medicinalUses.description: Rich in vitamins A, C, calcium, iron, and protein

medicinalUses.title: Anti-Inflammatory
medicinalUses.description: Reduces inflammation throughout the body naturally

medicinalUses.title: Blood Pressure
medicinalUses.description: Helps regulate blood pressure levels naturally

growingSteps.title: Seed Planting
growingSteps.description: Direct sow or plant in pots. Seeds germinate easily in 5-10 days.
growingSteps.tips: Soak seeds overnight; plant 1 inch deep in warm soil

growingSteps.title: Fast Growth
growingSteps.description: Can grow 3-5 meters in first year with proper care.
growingSteps.tips: Prune regularly to encourage branching and leaf production

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Leaves can be picked after 2-3 months. Harvest pods at 6-8 months.
growingSteps.tips: Cut branch tips to harvest leaves and stimulate new growth

en.title: Moringa
en.description: Called the Miracle Tree, every part is edible and packed with nutrients.

mr.title: शेवगा

title: Stevia
description: The natural sugar substitute that's 200-300 times sweeter than sugar with zero calories. Stevia has been used for centuries in South America and is now gaining worldwide popularity as a healthy sweetener.

medicinalUses.title: Sugar Substitute
medicinalUses.description: Natural sweetener for diabetics and weight management

medicinalUses.title: Dental Health
medicinalUses.description: Doesn't promote tooth decay unlike sugar

medicinalUses.title: Blood Sugar
medicinalUses.description: May help regulate blood glucose levels naturally

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Start from seedlings or cuttings (seeds are difficult). Plant after frost.
growingSteps.tips: Buy established seedlings; seeds have low germination rates

growingSteps.title: Growth
growingSteps.description: Requires warm temperatures and regular moisture. Grows 1-3 feet tall.
growingSteps.tips: Pinch growing tips to encourage bushy growth

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Pick leaves before flowering for best sweetness. Multiple harvests possible.
growingSteps.tips: Dry leaves slowly in shade to preserve sweetness

en.title: Stevia
en.description: Natural sugar substitute that's 200-300 times sweeter than sugar with zero calories.

description: Carom seeds are a staple in Indian kitchens and medicine cabinets. These tiny seeds pack a powerful punch with their thymol content, making them excellent for digestive and respiratory issues.

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Power
medicinalUses.description: Relieves gas, bloating, indigestion, and stomach cramps instantly

medicinalUses.title: Respiratory Support

medicinalUses.title: Antimicrobial
medicinalUses.description: Natural antibacterial and antifungal properties

growingSteps.title: Seed Sowing
growingSteps.description: Sow seeds in well-prepared beds in winter. Germination in 7-10 days.
growingSteps.tips: Direct sow; doesn't transplant well

growingSteps.title: Growth Period
growingSteps.description: Requires cool weather and full sun. Ready in 4-5 months.
growingSteps.tips: Thin plants to 6-8 inches apart

growingSteps.description: Harvest seed heads when they turn brown. Dry thoroughly before storage.

title: Kalmegh

medicinalUses.title: Liver Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Protects liver cells and supports detoxification processes

medicinalUses.title: Immune Enhancer

medicinalUses.description: Reduces fever and supports recovery from viral infections

mr.title: किरायत

title: Bel Patra
description: The sacred Bel tree is revered in Hindu tradition and valued in Ayurveda for its medicinal fruits and leaves. Every part of this tree has therapeutic properties, especially for digestive health.

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Relief
medicinalUses.description: Excellent for diarrhea, dysentery, and inflammatory bowel conditions

medicinalUses.title: Diabetes Support
medicinalUses.description: Helps regulate blood sugar and improves insulin sensitivity

medicinalUses.title: Heart Health

growingSteps.title: Planting

growingSteps.tips: Fresh seeds germinate better; remove fruit pulp completely

growingSteps.description: Slow initial growth. Fruit bearing starts after 5-7 years.

mr.title: बेल
mr.description: पवित्र वृक्ष जो पाचन आणि थंड गुणधर्मांसाठी प्रसिद्ध आहे.

title: Arjuna
description: Arjuna is known as the "Guardian of the Heart" in Ayurveda. Its bark has been used for thousands of years to support cardiovascular health and is one of the most important cardiac tonics.

medicinalUses.title: Cardiac Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Strengthens heart muscle and improves cardiac function naturally

medicinalUses.title: Blood Pressure
medicinalUses.description: Helps regulate blood pressure and supports circulation

medicinalUses.title: Cardioprotective
medicinalUses.description: Protects heart from oxidative stress and damage

growingSteps.title: Seed Planting
growingSteps.description: Sow fresh seeds in monsoon. Germination occurs in 2-4 weeks.
growingSteps.tips: Collect seeds from ripe fruits; plant immediately

growingSteps.title: Sapling Care
growingSteps.description: Water regularly in first 2-3 years. Grows to 60-80 feet.
growingSteps.tips: Prefers riverbanks and moist areas

growingSteps.title: Bark Harvest
growingSteps.description: Harvest bark from mature trees sustainably without killing tree.
growingSteps.tips: Take only small strips; allow tree to heal

en.title: Arjuna
en.description: The Guardian of the Heart, premier cardiac tonic in Ayurveda.

mr.title: अर्जुन
mr.description: हृदयाचा संरक्षक, आयुर्वेदातील प्रमुख हृदय टॉनिक.

title: Shankhpushpi
description: Named after its conch shell-shaped flowers, Shankhpushpi is a powerful brain tonic and memory enhancer. It's particularly valued for reducing stress and improving mental clarity.

medicinalUses.title: Brain Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Enhances memory, intelligence, and cognitive abilities

medicinalUses.title: Sleep Aid
medicinalUses.description: Promotes restful sleep and reduces insomnia naturally

medicinalUses.title: Stress Buster
medicinalUses.description: Calms nervous system and reduces anxiety effectively

growingSteps.title: Seed Sowing
growingSteps.description: Sow seeds in monsoon season. Germination in 10-15 days.
growingSteps.tips: Scarify seeds or soak overnight for better germination

growingSteps.title: Growth
growingSteps.description: Spreading ground cover, can grow 1-2 feet tall. Flowers abundantly.
growingSteps.tips: Needs space to spread; grows well in rock gardens

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Harvest whole plant when in flower. Dry in shade.
growingSteps.tips: Flowers contain maximum medicinal properties

en.title: Shankhpushpi
en.description: Powerful brain tonic and memory enhancer with stress-relieving properties.

mr.title: शंखपुष्पी
mr.description: मेंदूसाठी शक्तिशाली टॉनिक आणि स्मरणशक्ती वाढवणारी.

title: Triphala
description: Haritaki is one of the three fruits in the famous Triphala formulation. Known as the "King of Medicines," it's revered for its rejuvenating and detoxifying properties.

medicinalUses.title: Detoxifier
medicinalUses.description: Cleanses body of toxins and supports all elimination channels

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Regulates bowel movements and improves digestion

medicinalUses.title: Rejuvenator
medicinalUses.description: Anti-aging properties that promote longevity and vitality

growingSteps.title: Seed Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant fresh seeds in monsoon. Germination takes 3-4 weeks.
growingSteps.tips: Remove seed coat for faster germination

growingSteps.title: Growth Period
growingSteps.description: Slow growing tree. Fruit bearing starts after 6-8 years.
growingSteps.tips: Requires patience; long-lived productive tree

growingSteps.title: Fruit Harvest
growingSteps.description: Collect ripe fruits in winter. Dry thoroughly before use.
growingSteps.tips: Fruits darken when fully ripe and dry

en.title: Haritaki
en.description: King of Medicines, one-third of Triphala with powerful rejuvenating properties.

mr.title: हिरडा
mr.description: औषधांचा राजा, त्रिफळाचा एक घटक जो पुनर्जीवित करतो.

title: Bibhitaki
description: Bibhitaki is another component of Triphala, known for its powerful detoxifying effects on the respiratory and digestive systems. It's especially valued for mucus-related conditions.

medicinalUses.title: Respiratory Cleanser
medicinalUses.description: Removes excess mucus from lungs and respiratory passages

medicinalUses.title: Detoxifier
medicinalUses.description: Cleanses blood and removes toxins from body systems

medicinalUses.title: Hair Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Promotes hair growth and prevents premature graying

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Sow fresh seeds in monsoon season. Germination in 3-5 weeks.
growingSteps.tips: Crack hard seed coat carefully before planting

growingSteps.title: Tree Growth
growingSteps.description: Moderate growth rate. Bears fruit after 5-6 years.
growingSteps.tips: Prefers moist areas near water bodies

growingSteps.title: Harvesting
growingSteps.description: Collect mature fruits in winter. Dry and store properly.
growingSteps.tips: Fruits ready when they turn grayish-brown

en.title: Bibhitaki
en.description: Powerful respiratory cleanser and detoxifier, part of Triphala.

mr.title: बेहडा
mr.description: श्वसनसंस्था शुद्ध करणारी आणि त्रिफळाचा घटक.

title: Mulethi
description: Licorice root is naturally sweet and has been used for thousands of years for respiratory issues, digestive health, and as a harmonizing agent in herbal formulations.

medicinalUses.title: Respiratory Relief
medicinalUses.description: Soothes cough, sore throat, and bronchial inflammation

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Healer
medicinalUses.description: Protects stomach lining and reduces acidity naturally

medicinalUses.title: Anti-Inflammatory
medicinalUses.description: Reduces inflammation throughout the body

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant root cuttings or divisions in spring. Seeds are difficult.
growingSteps.tips: Use 4-6 inch root pieces with buds

growingSteps.title: Long Growth
growingSteps.description: Requires 3-4 years before root harvest. Be patient.
growingSteps.tips: Deep soil needed for long taproots

growingSteps.title: Root Harvest
growingSteps.description: Dig up roots after 3-4 years. Wash, peel, and dry thoroughly.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest in autumn for best sweetness

en.title: Licorice
en.description: Sweet root with powerful respiratory and digestive benefits.

mr.title: जेष्ठमध
mr.description: गोड मूळ जे श्वसन आणि पचनासाठी उत्कृष्ट आहे.

title: Kaunch Beej
description: Velvet bean is a powerful nervine tonic and aphrodisiac in Ayurveda. Its seeds contain L-Dopa, making it valuable for neurological support and vitality enhancement.

medicinalUses.title: Neuro Support
medicinalUses.description: Contains natural L-Dopa that supports brain function

medicinalUses.title: Vitality Booster
medicinalUses.description: Enhances energy, stamina, and reproductive health

medicinalUses.title: Mood Enhancer
medicinalUses.description: Naturally elevates mood and reduces stress

growingSteps.title: Seed Sowing
growingSteps.description: Sow seeds in monsoon. Scarify or soak overnight first.
growingSteps.tips: Hard seed coat; file or nick before planting

growingSteps.title: Climbing Growth
growingSteps.description: Provide strong support. Grows vigorously to 15-20 feet.
growingSteps.tips: Can be invasive; control spreading

growingSteps.title: Pod Harvest
growingSteps.description: Harvest mature pods carefully (hairy pods cause itching). Extract seeds.
growingSteps.tips: Wear gloves; pod hairs are irritating

en.title: Velvet Bean
en.description: Powerful nervine tonic with natural L-Dopa for brain and vitality support.

mr.title: कावच
mr.description: मेंदू आणि चैतन्य वाढवणारे शक्तिशाली औषध.

title: Manjistha
description: Manjistha is the ultimate blood purifier in Ayurveda, known for its deep red roots. It's highly valued for skin conditions, lymphatic cleansing, and supporting healthy circulation.

medicinalUses.title: Blood Purifier
medicinalUses.description: Premier herb for cleansing blood and improving complexion

medicinalUses.title: Skin Healer
medicinalUses.description: Treats acne, pigmentation, eczema, and other skin conditions

medicinalUses.title: Lymphatic Cleanser
medicinalUses.description: Supports lymphatic drainage and removes stagnation

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant seeds or root divisions in monsoon. Prefers cooler climates.
growingSteps.tips: Grows best in hilly regions with moderate temperatures

growingSteps.title: Climbing Growth
growingSteps.description: Provide support for climbing. Grows 3-6 feet.
growingSteps.tips: Mulch well to maintain moisture

growingSteps.title: Root Harvest
growingSteps.description: Harvest roots after 2-3 years. Wash and dry carefully.
growingSteps.tips: Roots have characteristic red color when fresh

en.title: Indian Madder
en.description: Ultimate blood purifier with deep red roots, excellent for skin health.

mr.title: मांजिष्ठा
mr.description: रक्त शुद्ध करणारे सर्वोत्कृष्ट औषध आणि त्वचेसाठी उत्तम.

title: Guggul
description: Guggul is a sacred resin with powerful cholesterol-lowering and anti-inflammatory properties. It's been used for thousands of years for joint health and metabolic disorders.

medicinalUses.title: Cholesterol Manager
medicinalUses.description: Naturally lowers LDL and raises HDL cholesterol levels

medicinalUses.title: Metabolism Booster
medicinalUses.description: Supports healthy weight loss and thyroid function

medicinalUses.title: Joint Support
medicinalUses.description: Reduces arthritis pain and inflammation

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant seeds in arid regions. Germination is challenging.
growingSteps.tips: Thrives in desert conditions; drought-tolerant

growingSteps.title: Growth
growingSteps.description: Slow-growing shrub, 3-6 feet tall. Requires minimal care.
growingSteps.tips: Protect from overwatering; prefers dry conditions

growingSteps.title: Resin Collection
growingSteps.description: Tap bark in winter to collect resin. Sustainable harvesting essential.
growingSteps.tips: Make shallow cuts; don't harm the plant

en.title: Guggul
en.description: Sacred resin with powerful cholesterol-lowering and anti-inflammatory properties.

mr.title: गुग्गुळ
mr.description: कोलेस्टेरॉल कमी करणारे आणि सूज कमी करणारे पवित्र रेझिन.

title: Vacha
description: Sweet flag is a powerful brain tonic and speech enhancer. Its rhizomes have been used traditionally to improve memory, voice quality, and treat respiratory conditions.

medicinalUses.title: Brain Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Enhances memory, concentration, and cognitive abilities

medicinalUses.title: Voice Enhancer
medicinalUses.description: Traditionally used to improve voice quality and speech

medicinalUses.title: Respiratory Aid
medicinalUses.description: Helps with congestion and respiratory issues

growingSteps.title: Aquatic Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant rhizomes in shallow water or water-logged soil.
growingSteps.tips: Prefers pond edges and marshy areas

growingSteps.title: Water Maintenance
growingSteps.description: Keep constantly moist or submerged. Thrives in wetlands.
growingSteps.tips: Change water regularly if in containers

growingSteps.title: Rhizome Harvest
growingSteps.description: Dig rhizomes after 2-3 years. Clean and dry properly.
growingSteps.tips: Harvest in autumn for maximum potency

en.title: Sweet Flag
en.description: Powerful brain tonic and speech enhancer with respiratory benefits.

mr.title: वेखंड
mr.description: मेंदू आणि वाणीसाठी शक्तिशाली टॉनिक.

title: Punarnava
description: Punarnava means 'that which renews' in Sanskrit. It's a powerful diuretic and rejuvenator, particularly valued for kidney and liver support, and reducing water retention.

medicinalUses.title: Kidney Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Supports kidney function and reduces water retention naturally

medicinalUses.title: Liver Support
medicinalUses.description: Protects and regenerates liver cells

medicinalUses.title: Heart Health
medicinalUses.description: Reduces fluid around heart and supports cardiac function

growingSteps.title: Seed Sowing
growingSteps.description: Sow seeds in monsoon. Germinates quickly in 5-7 days.
growingSteps.tips: Can also grow from stem cuttings easily

growingSteps.title: Spreading Growth
growingSteps.description: Spreads as ground cover. Grows 1-2 feet with pink flowers.
growingSteps.tips: Thrives in poor soil; very hardy plant

growingSteps.title: Whole Plant Harvest
growingSteps.description: Use entire plant including roots. Harvest during flowering.
growingSteps.tips: Wash roots thoroughly before drying

en.title: Hogweed
en.description: Powerful rejuvenator and diuretic for kidney and liver support.

mr.title: पुनर्नवा
mr.description: मूत्रपिंड आणि यकृतासाठी शक्तिशाली पुनर्जीवक औषध.

title: Kutki
description: Kutki is a high-altitude Himalayan herb, considered one of the most powerful liver protectors in Ayurveda. It's bitter but highly effective for liver disorders and fever.

medicinalUses.title: Liver Protector
medicinalUses.description: One of the most powerful hepatoprotective herbs known

medicinalUses.title: Fever Reducer
medicinalUses.description: Effective for chronic and intermittent fevers

medicinalUses.title: Immune Booster
medicinalUses.description: Strengthens immune system and fights infections

growingSteps.title: High Altitude
growingSteps.description: Requires cool mountain climate. Difficult to grow in plains.
growingSteps.tips: Best grown above 3000m altitude

growingSteps.title: Cold Tolerant
growingSteps.description: Grows in rocky alpine meadows. Cold-hardy plant.
growingSteps.tips: Needs cold winters for proper growth

growingSteps.title: Root Harvest
growingSteps.description: Harvest rhizomes after 3-4 years. Sustainable collection crucial.
growingSteps.tips: Endangered species; cultivate rather than wild-harvest

en.title: Kutki
en.description: Powerful Himalayan liver protector and fever reducer.

mr.title: कुटकी
mr.description: हिमालयातील शक्तिशाली यकृत संरक्षक औषध.

title: Vidanga
description: Vidanga is a powerful antiparasitic herb, traditionally used to eliminate intestinal worms. It's also valued for weight management and digestive health.

medicinalUses.title: Worm Eliminator
medicinalUses.description: Traditional remedy for intestinal parasites and worms

medicinalUses.title: Metabolism Booster
medicinalUses.description: Supports healthy weight loss and fat metabolism

medicinalUses.title: Digestive Aid
medicinalUses.description: Improves digestion and relieves gas and bloating

growingSteps.title: Planting
growingSteps.description: Plant seeds or cuttings in monsoon. Prefers partial shade.
growingSteps.tips: Grows naturally in forest understory

growingSteps.title: Climbing Growth
growingSteps.description: Provide support for climbing. Can grow 10-15 feet.
growingSteps.tips: Slow initial growth; patience required

growingSteps.title: Berry Harvest
growingSteps.description: Collect ripe black berries in winter. Dry thoroughly.
growingSteps.tips: Berries have characteristic pungent taste

en.title: False Black Pepper
en.description: Powerful antiparasitic herb for digestive health and weight management.

mr.title: वावडिंग
mr.description: अंतड्यांतील किडे नष्ट करणारे आणि पचनासाठी उत्तम औषध.

title: Yashtimadhu
description: Also known as Mulethi or Licorice, Yashtimadhu is naturally sweet and has harmonizing properties. It enhances the efficacy of other herbs while providing its own healing benefits.

medicinalUses.title: Voice Tonic
medicinalUses.description: Soothes throat and improves voice quality for singers

medicinalUses.title: Ulcer Healer
medicinalUses.description: Protects and heals stomach and duodenal ulcers

medicinalUses.title: Complexion Enhancer
medicinalUses.description: Improves skin tone and reduces pigmentation

growingSteps.title: Root Division
growingSteps.description: Plant stolon or root cuttings in spring. Deep soil essential.
growingSteps.tips: Needs 3-4 feet deep soil for taproot

growingSteps.title: Long Wait
growingSteps.description: Requires 3-4 years before harvest. Slow but worthwhile.
growingSteps.tips: Mark plants; easy to forget location

growingSteps.title: Root Harvest
growingSteps.description: Dig carefully to get entire root. Wash, peel, and dry.
growingSteps.tips: Autumn harvest yields sweetest roots

en.title: Licorice Root
en.description: Sweet harmonizing root for voice, ulcers, and skin health.

mr.title: जेष्ठमध
mr.description: आवाज, व्रण आणि त्वचेसाठी गोड मूळ.

title: Chirata
description: Chirata is an intensely bitter herb from the Himalayas, renowned for its powerful fever-reducing and liver-protective properties. It's considered one of the best bitters in Ayurveda.

medicinalUses.title: Fever Remedy
medicinalUses.description: Extremely effective for chronic and malarial fevers

medicinalUses.title: Liver Cleanser
medicinalUses.description: Detoxifies liver and improves liver enzyme levels

medicinalUses.title: Blood Sugar
medicinalUses.description: Helps regulate blood glucose levels naturally

growingSteps.title: Cool Climate
growingSteps.description: Requires temperate mountain climate. Grows at 1200-3000m.
growingSteps.tips: Cannot tolerate heat; needs cool temperatures

growingSteps.title: Seed Sowing
growingSteps.description: Sow seeds in spring in moist, shaded areas.
growingSteps.tips: Very fine seeds; mix with sand for sowing

growingSteps.title: Whole Plant Harvest
growingSteps.description: Harvest entire plant when flowering. Dry in shade.
growingSteps.tips: Bitter taste increases with drying

en.title: Chirayita
en.description: Intensely bitter Himalayan herb for fever and liver protection.

mr.title: किराईत
mr.description: ताप आणि यकृत संरक्षणासाठी अत्यंत कडू हिमालयी औषध.
